info.title: Project Management API
info.description: REST API for the Human-AI Collaborative Project Management System.

get.description: Returns whether the system needs initial setup (no users exist).

post.description: Creates the first admin user. Only works if no users exist in the database.
Authenticates a user with username and password, creates a session.
Ends the current session and clears the session cookie.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user.

post.description: Create a named agent pool with its own secret. Admin only.

get.description: List all pools with summary (agent count, claimed count). Admin only.

get.summary: Get pool details with agent list
get.description: Get pool details with full agent list. Admin only.

patch.description: Update pool name and/or description. Admin only.

delete.description: Delete pool and deactivate its agents. Admin only.

post.description: Update the secret for a specific pool. Admin only.
Create N AI agent users in a specific pool. Admin only.

delete.description: Remove an agent from a pool. If the agent has existing activity (comments, tasks, etc.), it will be deactivated and removed from the pool instead of deleted. Admin only.

400.description: Agent does not belong to this pool

post.summary: Claim an agent from a pool
post.description: Authenticate with pool name and secret to claim an available AI agent. Returns user info and a fresh API token.

503.description: No agents available or pool not configured

post.description: Release the current user's agent claim, making them available for others.
Extend the TTL of the current user's agent claim.

get.description: Get all pools with summary. Admin only. Redirects to list.

post.description: Force-release an agent's claim by admin. Takes the agent user ID.

get.description: Returns all users. Admin only.

post.description: Creates a new user. For AI agent users, returns the API token (shown once). Admin only.
Regenerates the API token for a user. Returns the new raw token. Admin only.
Sets the user as inactive. Admin only.
Sets the user as active. Admin only.

get.description: List all projects with optional status filter.

post.description: Create a new project. A slug is auto-generated from the name.

get.description: Get a project by ID.

delete.description: Soft-delete a project by setting its status to archived.

get.description: Get task counts by status, epic count, and proposal count for a project.
List proposals for a project with optional status and claim filters.

post.description: Create a new proposal for a project.

get.description: Get a proposal by ID with comments and linked work items.

200.description: Proposal details with comments and work items

post.description: Change proposal status with role enforcement. AI agents must hold the claim. Terminal transitions clear the claim.

403.description: Forbidden — actor type not allowed for this transition

409.description: Claim denied — proposal claimed by another agent or unclaimed

get.description: List all comments on a proposal.

post.description: Add a comment to a proposal. AI agents must hold the claim. If proposal is open and commenter is an AI agent, auto-transitions to discussing.

409.description: Claim denied — proposal claimed by another agent or unclaimed

get.description: List epics and tasks spawned from this proposal.

200.description: Work items linked to this proposal

post.description: Atomically create epics and tasks from a proposal, transitioning it to in_progress. AI agents must hold the claim.

200.description: Proposal moved to in_progress and work items created

400.description: Invalid status — proposal is already in_progress, completed, or rejected

409.description: Claim denied — proposal claimed by another agent or unclaimed

post.description: Atomically claim a proposal for the caller. Returns a structured result without leaking other claimants' IDs.
Release the caller's claim on a proposal. Humans can release any claim; AI agents only their own.

get.description: List all epics for a project with optional status, milestone, and claim filters.

post.description: Create a new epic in a project.

get.description: Get an epic by ID with task summary and claim_status.

patch.description: Update epic fields. AI agents must hold the claim. Transitioning to a terminal status (completed/cancelled) clears the claim.

409.description: Claim denied — epic claimed by another agent or unclaimed

delete.description: Soft-delete an epic by setting its status to cancelled. AI agents must hold the claim.

409.description: Claim denied — epic claimed by another agent or unclaimed

post.description: Atomically claim an epic for the caller. Returns a structured result without leaking other claimants' IDs.
Release the caller's claim on an epic. Humans can release any claim; AI agents only their own.

get.description: List tasks for a project with rich filtering, sorting, and pagination.

post.description: Create a new task in a project.

get.description: Get a task by ID with full details.

patch.description: Update task fields. Context JSON is merged with existing context.

delete.description: Soft-delete a task by setting its status to cancelled.

post.description: Create a subtask of a given task. Inherits the parent's project.

get.description: List all subtasks of a task.

post.description: Find and atomically claim the highest-priority ready task. Returns the claimed task or 404 if nothing available.

403.description: Guardrail blocked or max concurrent tasks reached

post.description: Change a task's status using validated workflow transitions. Optionally add a comment.
Atomically claim a task for the caller. Sets the caller as assignee. Returns a structured result without leaking other claimants' IDs.
Release the caller's claim. Humans can release any claim; AI agents only their own.

get.description: Return in-flight tasks for a project, optionally filtered to a label name. Used as a boundary-time check before touching a subsystem.
List all comments on a task, in chronological order.

post.description: Add a comment to a task.

patch.description: Update a comment's body or metadata.

get.description: List all labels for a project.

post.description: Create a new label for a project. Name must be unique within the project.

409.description: Label name already exists in this project

patch.description: Update a label's name, color, or description.

409.description: Label name already exists in this project

delete.description: Delete a label and all its task associations.

post.description: Attach a label to a task.

409.description: Label already attached to this task

delete.description: Remove a label from a task.

404.description: Label not attached to this task

post.description: Add a dependency between tasks. Performs cycle detection to prevent circular dependencies.

get.description: Search across proposals, tasks, and comments using FTS5 full-text search.
Get paginated activity feed for a project, with optional filters.
Returns recent activity by other users since a given timestamp. Designed for agents polling for human input between work steps.
Get activity history for a specific task.
List all milestones for a project.

post.description: Create a new milestone for a project.

get.description: List all git refs (branches, commits, PRs) linked to a task.

post.description: Add a git ref (branch, commit, or pull request) to a task.

patch.description: Update a git ref (e.g., PR status).

delete.description: Remove a git ref from a task.

post.description: Public webhook endpoint for git events. Accepts branch creation and commit push events to auto-link branches and commits to tasks based on naming conventions.

get.description: Export a complete project and all related data as JSON. Optionally include the activity log.

post.description: Import a project from previously exported JSON. Creates new IDs for all entities.
Create a backup of the SQLite database file.

get.description: List all automation rules for a project.

post.description: Create a new automation rule for a project.
Enable or disable an automation rule.

get.description: List templates with optional filters for project_id and template_type.

post.description: Create a new task or project template.

patch.description: Update a template's name, description, or template_data.

post.description: Create a task or project from a template. For task templates, provide project_id. For project templates, provide workspace_id and name.
Snapshot a task (with subtasks) as a task template.

Atomically acquire the named lock for the caller, or join the FIFO queue if held. Idempotent for the current holder. Optionally attach landing intent (taskId / branch / commitSha / verifyCmd / worktreePath) — all optional, used for observability while held or queued.

400.description: Validation error (e.g. taskId not in this project)

404.description: Project or referenced task not found

post.description: Refresh the holder's lease. Returns not_holder if the caller doesn't currently hold the lock (e.g. lease already swept).

Release the lock and promote the queue head. If landedSha is provided, the release event carries it as the 'main moved' announcement. If landedSha is omitted and a reason is given, the release is an abandon — the reason is stored on the lock so the next holder can see why main hasn't moved (e.g. 'verify failed: skinned_renderer.cpp API drift').

get.description: Return the current state of the lock. Holder identity is reported relative to the caller as 'you' / 'someone_else' / 'none'.
List all known locks for a project (one per resource name).

post.description: Worker submits a request to land branch/commitSha into the named lane (defaults to 'main'). Returns the queued row. The integrator process picks it up asynchronously; subscribe to merge.request.* SSE events for the outcome.

400.description: Validation error (e.g. taskId not in this project)

get.summary: List merge requests in a project
get.description: Returns requests for the project ordered by enqueuedAt ASC. Optional filters: resource, status, taskId. Paginated.

get.summary: Get a merge request with attempts
get.description: Returns the request plus all attempts (most-recent first).

post.description: Submitter or admin cancels a queued request (queued → abandoned). 409 if the request is integrating or already terminal (use force-cancel for integrating).

403.description: Only the submitter or an admin may cancel

post.summary: Integrator picks up a queued request
post.description: queued → integrating. Sets pickedUpAt and emits merge.request.integrating. Integrator (ai_agent) only. 409 from any non-queued state (no idempotent case — re-pickup throws). Optional batchId/speculativePosition tag the emitted SSE frame.

post.summary: Integrator resets a stuck integrating request back to queued
post.description: integrating → queued. Used for crash recovery and post-verify push-race retry. Cancels any open attempts. Integrator (ai_agent) only. Returns 409 if not in 'integrating'.
Admin override: forces queued OR integrating → abandoned. The integrator discovers this on its next land/reject/completeAttempt call (which returns 409 INVALID_TRANSITION).
Records baseSha and creates a running attempt row.

patch.description: Discriminated on status: passed requires treeSha; failed requires failureCategory + failureReason; cancelled requires only status.

post.description: integrating → landed. Transactionally creates a git_refs row of type 'landed_sha' if the request is linked to a task. Idempotent on landed → landed.
integrating → rejected. Transactionally creates a 'merge_rejection' comment on the linked task with structured metadata. Idempotent on rejected → rejected.

Thin relay (design §13.2): the integrator POSTs one of four batch markers (started / member_landed / member_invalidated / completed); PM re-emits it on the merge.batch.* SSE stream and persists NOTHING. Integrator (ai_agent) only.

get.description: Returns the server health status and current timestamp.
